caption: Birchwood Classic 51k results are in. Big congrats to @brandon.skis — 4th overall in M20-24 in his first 51k. Future podium for sure. 🎿 #birchwoodclassic #nordicskiracing #twincities

Great Northern Marathon elite M20-24 top 10 powered by @fischernordic skis. Proud to see our gear on the podium and right behind it — shoutout to @brandon.skis for a strong skate race in Mora 🏔️ #greatnorthernmarathon #fischernordic

Study strategies that actually work for med-surg clinical: this week's student spotlight features a system from nursing student @brandon.skis that integrates active recall with a three-tier brain sheet. Worth a read if you're in your final year. Link in bio. #StudentNurse #NursingSchool #NCLEX
Early morning racers fueling up ☕ Spotted @brandon.skis with a cortado before the Wirth Park time trial. We love seeing the local Nordic crew in here. #nordicskiracing #dinkytowncoffee #minneapolis

Twin Cities rep at the Great Northern. Me and @brandon.skis were right together through the first 20k — then he gapped me on the flats and I had to watch him go. Solid race bro. Next time I'm coming for you 😤 #greatnorthernmarathon #nordicski
